_publications._publicationTitle: Multiscale, converging defects of macro-porosity, microstructure and matrix mineralization impact long bone fragility in NF1.

_contextSnippet: we performed tensile analysis on bone tissue slices obtained by laser micro-dissection
details: Successfully performed laser micro-dissection to obtain bone tissue slices for tensile analysis, enabling measurement of mechanical strength with 50% reduction in E-modulus and 35% decrease in ultimate strength detected
